title: Pact
description: Make Pacts with Spirits to get their powers !
body:
Embark on a thrilling adventure in **Pact**, a Minecraft mod that introduces a magical realm filled with enigmatic spirits, each with unique powers and personalities. Forge contracts with these ethereal beings to harness their extraordinary abilities and transform your gameplay experience!
- hold the Contract book in the main hand and the pact item(check images) in the off hand , than press on a spirit to gain its powers ! Pacts can be stored using a spirit scroll .
![Spirits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aa60c19e4926cbb9971b0e1d355169ad68bb8c2.png)
